items.title: Visa to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conference
items.description: SAN FRANCISCO, August 25, 2025--Visa (NYSE: V) today announced its participation in the following investor conference.

items.title: Affirm to Post Q4 Earnings: Buy, Hold or Sell the Stock Now?
items.description: AFRM heads into fiscal Q4 earnings with rising revenue, strong consumer growth and key partnerships, but faces valuation and competition pressures.

items.title: Authvia Integrates Visa Direct to Enable Real-Time Payouts via Text and Messaging
items.description: LOS ANGELES, August 25, 2025--Authvia, the leader in conversational commerce and text-based payment innovation, today announced it has integrated Visa Direct, Visa’s real-time1 money movement platform, into its TXT2PAY® solution. Leveraging the combined technology of Authvia and Visa Direct, which facilitates the delivery of funds directly to eligible Visa debit cards in real-time, Authvia is enabling real-time disbursements across industries like healthcare, automotive services, insurance, and

items.title: Digital Payment Today - Vietnam's Fintech Boom: A Cashless Future Emerges
items.description: The digital payment sector in Vietnam is undergoing a significant transformation, underpinned by rapid adoption of mobile wallets and digital payment solutions. This growth is driven by a tech-savvy youth demographic, increased smartphone and internet penetration, and a push towards a cashless society. The Vietnam fintech market, valued at USD 15.67 billion in 2024, is projected to reach over USD 50 billion by 2030, with payments via internet and mobile channels showing substantial growth...

items.title: Visa halts open banking operations in US amid regulatory challenges
items.description: The company has ceased its open-banking initiatives aimed at providing third parties access to customer account data.
